tool_input.summary: Catalog search for Mars/Arabia Terra fluvial depositional systems did not return a dedicated geomorphology or crater-count dataset in this catalog snapshot, but it did return the key orbital datasets typically used to map and date Arabia Terra fluvial deposits (topography, radar, and mineralogy). Geologic age constraints (late Noachian–early Hesperian) generally come from crater counts on/around the mapped deposits using these basemaps.

candidates.title: MGS-M-MOLA-5-MEGDR-L3-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: Global MOLA gridded topography (MEGDR) used as basemap to delineate valleys/inverted channels and to support stratigraphic context and crater-count mapping for Arabia Terra surfaces.

candidates.title: MOLA Topography Data in IMG Format
candidates.reasoning: PDS4-packaged MOLA topography products (IMG) convenient for GIS/quantitative analysis supporting mapping and age assignment of fluvial depositional systems.

candidates.title: MRO M SHARAD 4 RDR V1
candidates.reasoning: SHARAD radar RDRs can constrain subsurface structure/thickness of sedimentary packages in Arabia Terra that may be associated with fluvial deposition, aiding stratigraphic relationships that feed into age interpretations.

candidates.title: Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter SHARAD U.S. Radargrams Bundle
candidates.reasoning: PDS4 SHARAD radargram bundle (derived) for rapid inspection/analysis of stratigraphy beneath Arabia Terra deposits; complements crater-count and mapping workflows.

candidates.title: MRO-M-CRISM-2-EDR-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: CRISM EDRs provide hyperspectral observations used to identify alteration minerals (e.g., phyllosilicates) commonly associated with Noachian terrains in Arabia Terra and to interpret aqueous/fluvial settings and relative timing.

candidates.title: MRO-M-CRISM-6-DDR-V1.0
candidates.reasoning: CRISM DDRs (geometry/ancillary) needed to properly project and analyze CRISM observations over Arabia Terra, supporting mineral/stratigraphic interpretations tied to fluvial activity timing.

candidates.title: Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter CRISM MTRDR Data Collection
candidates.reasoning: Map-projected CRISM targeted RDRs (MTRDR) facilitate regional mineralogic mapping over Arabia Terra fluvial deposits; often used alongside imagery/topography for interpreting environments and relative ages.

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.

parts.args: {"summary":"Catalog search for Mars/Arabia Terra fluvial depositional systems did not return a dedicated geomorphology or crater-count dataset in this catalog snapshot, but it did return the key orbital datasets typically used to map and date Arabia Terra fluvial deposits (topography, radar, and mineralogy). Geologic age constraints (late Noachian–early Hesperian) generally come from crater counts on/around the mapped deposits using these basemaps.","candidates":[{"dataset_id":"MGS-M-MOLA-5-MEGDR-L3-V1.0","title":"MGS-M-MOLA-5-MEGDR-L3-V1.0","mission":"Mars Global Surveyor","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"Global MOLA gridded topography (MEGDR) used as basemap to delineate valleys/inverted channels and to support stratigraphic context and crater-count mapping for Arabia Terra surfaces."},{"dataset_id":"urn:nasa:pds:mex_marsis_optim:topography_data::1.0","title":"MOLA Topography Data in IMG Format","mission":"MARS GLOBAL SURVEYOR","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS4","reasoning":"PDS4-packaged MOLA topography products (IMG) convenient for GIS/quantitative analysis supporting mapping and age assignment of fluvial depositional systems."},{"dataset_id":"MRO-M-SHARAD-4-RDR-V1","title":"MRO M SHARAD 4 RDR V1","mission":"Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"SHARAD radar RDRs can constrain subsurface structure/thickness of sedimentary packages in Arabia Terra that may be associated with fluvial deposition, aiding stratigraphic relationships that feed into age interpretations."},{"dataset_id":"urn:nasa:pds:mro_sharad_us_radargrams::1.0","title":"Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter SHARAD U.S. Radargrams Bundle","mission":"MARS RECONNAISSANCE ORBITER","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS4","reasoning":"PDS4 SHARAD radargram bundle (derived) for rapid inspection/analysis of stratigraphy beneath Arabia Terra deposits; complements crater-count and mapping workflows."},{"dataset_id":"MRO-M-CRISM-2-EDR-V1.0","title":"MRO-M-CRISM-2-EDR-V1.0","mission":"Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"CRISM EDRs provide hyperspectral observations used to identify alteration minerals (e.g., phyllosilicates) commonly associated with Noachian terrains in Arabia Terra and to interpret aqueous/fluvial settings and relative timing."},{"dataset_id":"MRO-M-CRISM-6-DDR-V1.0","title":"MRO-M-CRISM-6-DDR-V1.0","mission":"Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS3","reasoning":"CRISM DDRs (geometry/ancillary) needed to properly project and analyze CRISM observations over Arabia Terra, supporting mineral/stratigraphic interpretations tied to fluvial activity timing."},{"dataset_id":"urn:nasa:pds:mro_crism_mtrdr:data_mtrdr::1.0","title":"Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter CRISM MTRDR Data Collection","mission":"MARS RECONNAISSANCE ORBITER","node":"geo","pds_version":"PDS4","reasoning":"Map-projected CRISM targeted RDRs (MTRDR) facilitate regional mineralogic mapping over Arabia Terra fluvial deposits; often used alongside imagery/topography for interpreting environments and relative ages."}]}
